title: AIOT Botania
description: This mod adds AIOTs to Botania.
body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/) **[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)** ![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/header.png)
![Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/overview.png)
![Creative Tab](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/creative_tab.png) The Elementium Hoe/AIOT creates not only farmland, but it creates *Super Farmland*. It doesn't need water and will not turn to dirt when falling on it. And the pink sparkles, *wow*! More information about the single items can be found in the **Lexica Botania**. ![Super Farmland Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/super_farmland_preview.gif)
![Recipes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/recipes.png)
Click to expand **Elementium Aiot** ![Elementium Aiot Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/recipes/elementium_aiot.png) **Livingrock Shears** ![Livingrock Shears Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/recipes/livingrock_shears.png) **Livingwood Shears** ![Livingwood Shears Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/recipes/livingwood_shears.png)
You are allowed to put this mod in any modpack you like. ![[Werbung](https://www.bisecthosting.com/melanx)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/aiot-botania/promo.png) #Werbung #Ad
